scripts.build: yarn workspace @holon/shared build && concurrently "yarn workspace @holon/client build" "yarn workspace @holon/server build"
scripts.lint: concurrently "yarn workspace @holon/client lint" "yarn workspace @holon/server lint" "yarn workspace @holon/shared lint"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently "yarn workspace @holon/client lint:fix" "yarn workspace @holon/server lint:fix" "yarn workspace @holon/shared lint:fix"
